title: Skeletal Remains
description: A mod that adds in new Variants of the Skeleton Mob
body:
Skeletal Remains

About

Skeletal Remains is a mod inspired by Rotten Creatures developed by FustionStudio

This mod adds in different types of Skeletons with different properties.

Features

Skeletal Remains aims towards adding in new variants of the Vanilla Skeleton mob

This mod currently features:
  • New Biome based Skeleton types

  • Special drops from those Skeletons

    • Everything can be found on the Wiki
